prose:
Fukui Reactivity Indices for Aniline

Fukui reactivity indices were computed for aniline using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`). This was a single point calculation on the user-provided geometry in the gas phase, with a charge of 0 and multiplicity of 1. The calculation was performed using chemkit's DFT backend (PySCF).

The most electrophilic site is Carbon (C) at atom index 3 (0-based index 2), with a Fukui f⁺ index of 2.2975867.
The most nucleophilic site is Nitrogen (N) at atom index 1 (0-based index 0), with a Fukui f⁻ index of 0.20452359.
